nav.title: Skills
nav.summary: Browse installed skills locally and jump to the external marketplace section.

anchorDescriptions.installed: Manage skills already available in this environment.
anchorDescriptions.market: Search and download more skills from skills.sh.

page.title: Skills
page.subtitle: Manage installed skills and discover reusable skills from the external marketplace.

installed.subtitleAll: Manage all installed user-level and project-level skills
installed.subtitleProject: Project-level skills in the current workspace

categories.all: All installed skills, including built-in, user-level, and project-level.
categories.builtin: Core skills shipped with the app. They cannot be deleted.
categories.user: User-level skills installed globally for your account.
categories.project: Project-level skills for the current workspace.
categories.suite: Built-in skill suites grouped by mode, with one-click visibility controls.

user.description: Skills installed globally for the current user.

project.description: Project-level skills in the current workspace.

market.title: Skill Marketplace
market.subtitle: Search and download reusable skills (default scope: current project)

suite.title: Skill Suites
suite.subtitle: Pick a mode to manage skill visibility. Group actions apply immediately, while individual skill edits can be saved per group.

resetDialog.title: Reset {{mode}}?
resetDialog.message: This will restore the mode's skill visibility to the default state.
resetDialog.messageWithUnsaved: This will restore the mode's skill visibility to the default state and discard the current unsaved edits.

skillState.coveredDetail: Enabled, but this mode uses the same-name skill from {{source}}.

messages.saveFirst: Save the current skill edits first.

path.label: Skill Folder Path
path.placeholder: Select or enter skill folder path
path.hint: Folder must contain a valid SKILL.md file

list.remoteUnavailable: Skill management is unavailable during a remote connection.

item.openPathInExplorer: Open this folder in file explorer
item.revealPathUnavailableRemote: Remote workspace paths cannot be opened in the local file manager
item.shadowedTooltip: The same-name skill from {{source}} normally has higher priority.

deleteModal.title: Confirm Delete
deleteModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete skill "{{name}}"?
deleteModal.warning: This will delete the skill folder and cannot be undone.

messages.invalidPath: Please select a valid skill folder
messages.noWorkspace: Please open a workspace first to add project-level skills
messages.revealPathFailed: Could not open in file explorer: {{error}}
